homepage.title: Iconem
homepage.description: Iconem's mission is to contribute to heritage conservation. By scanning threatened sites, we hope to facilitate their exploration and study, for today and tomorrow.

About Iconem
Founded in 2013, Iconem is an innovative startup that specialises in the digitisation of endangered cultural heritage sites in 3D. We work with international organisations, national governments, local authorities, and world class museums such as UNESCO, the Aga Khan Trust for Culture, the Sultanate of Oman, the City of Paris, and the Louvre. We design site-specific architectural 3D models; large-scale urban and rural 3D models; museum exhibitions; and training for local professionals.
Iconem Research focuses on 3D scanning heritage sites, monuments, and cities with archaeologists, architects, restorators, and institutions such as UNESCO...
Iconem Studio creates immersive exhibitions promoting heritage with major museums worldwide, produces video and images for documentaries...
Discover our most recent projects on an interactive 3D platform. Used by specialists and partners, use it to access the highest-resolution data
Contribute to Iconem Fund for Endangered Heritage as an organization or an individual, and help preserve the most fragile icons of our heritage via emergency missions
